case_title: EAGLECREEK ASSOCIATES I VS. IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAGLECREEK ASSOCIATES I AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
FEE FOR APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF SISTER-SATAE JUDGT & AUTHORIZATION TO EXECUTE IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF EAGLECREEK ASSOCIATES I

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC $59,701.93 PRINCIPAL, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $59,907.93, TOTAL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT - $59907.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
